title: Property Consultant - WeWork India - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - WeWork India - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
WeWork India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Property Consultant for our Thane operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About WeWork India:
WeWork India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with WeWork India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
